name: UBA : Browsed to Mixed Content/Potentially Adult Website
notes:
A user has accessed a URL which may indicate elevated security or legal risk.

References: 
    http://sitereview.bluecoat.com/categories.jsp
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%adult%' or "Web Category" ilike '%extrem%' or "Web Category" ilike '%gruesome%' or "Web Category" ilike '%profanity%' or "Web Category" ilike '%hate%' or "Web Category" ilike '%discrimination%' or "Web Category" ilike '%abortion%' or "Web Category" ilike '%weapon%' or "Web Category" ilike '%violen%' or "Web Category" ilike '%alcohol%' or "Web Category" ilike '%drug%' or "Web Category" ilike '%tabacco%' or "Web Category" ilike '%marijuana%' or "Web Category" ilike '%controlled substance%' OR "Web Category" in (1, 10, 19, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 66, 87, 88, 89, 90, 92, 93, 111) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Browsed to Mixed Content/Potentially Adult Website on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
